description: Minimal Recipes — existence proofs for Component operators

recipes.purpose_td: Provides a spatial and hierarchical context for operators.
recipes.translation: A box that holds things together so they can be treated as one.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Operators lose shared context and cannot be positioned or managed as a unit.
recipes.what_this_is_not: Not a layout tool or viewport manager.

description: Minimal Recipes — existence proofs for Component operators

recipes.purpose_td: Receives texture data from another process via shared memory.
recipes.translation: Takes an image from another running program.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: No external process data enters TouchDesigner.
recipes.what_this_is_not: Not a file loader or network streamer.

recipes.purpose_td: Sends texture data to another process via shared memory.
recipes.translation: Hands an image to another running program.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: No image data leaves TouchDesigner for other applications.
recipes.what_this_is_not: Not a recorder or file exporter.

recipes.purpose_td: Adds uniform light to a 3D scene without direction.
recipes.translation: Lights everything the same from everywhere.
recipes.what_this_is_not: Not a directional or shadow-casting light.

recipes.purpose_td: Interpolates between multiple inputs based on a blend value.
recipes.translation: Slides between things instead of picking one.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: No continuous transition between inputs is possible.

recipes.purpose_td: Defines a transformable joint used in skeletal hierarchies.
recipes.translation: A bendable stick that connects parts together.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Hierarchical deformation and joint-based motion are impossible.
recipes.what_this_is_not: Not a mesh or animation system.

recipes.purpose_td: Defines a viewpoint for rendering 3D scenes.
recipes.translation: Tells the system where to look from.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: The scene cannot be rendered from a viewpoint.

recipes.purpose_td: Interpolates between multiple camera transforms.
recipes.translation: Slides the view from one camera to another.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Smooth camera transitions are not possible.
recipes.what_this_is_not: Not a cut or camera switch.

recipes.purpose_td: Illuminates a scene using an environment map.
recipes.translation: Lights objects using a surrounding picture.
recipes.what_this_is_not: Not a flat or directional light.

recipes.purpose_td: Loads and manages FBX-based geometry and animation.
recipes.translation: Brings in a 3D model made somewhere else.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: External FBX assets cannot enter the scene.

recipes.purpose_td: Holds and renders SOP-based geometry.
recipes.translation: Turns shapes into something you can see.

recipes.purpose_td: Provides interactive transform controls in the viewer.
recipes.translation: Lets you grab and move things with the mouse.
recipes.what_this_is_not: Not an animation or constraint system.

recipes.purpose_td: Emits directional or point-based light into a 3D scene.
recipes.translation: Shines light from one place or direction.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: No directional illumination or shadows appear.
recipes.what_this_is_not: Not an environment or ambient light.

recipes.purpose_td: Acts as a neutral placeholder in a component hierarchy.
recipes.translation: An empty holder that does nothing on purpose.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Stable reference points and clean hierarchy anchors are lost.

recipes.purpose_td: Loads and manages USD scene descriptions.
recipes.translation: Brings in a big 3D scene file with structure.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: USD-based scenes cannot be accessed or rendered.

description: Minimal Recipes — existence proofs for UI / control / system Component operators

recipes.purpose_td: Draws explanatory text directly over viewer content.
recipes.translation: Writes labels on top of what you see.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: No inline visual explanation can be attached to imagery.
recipes.what_this_is_not: Not a text renderer for layout or UI.

recipes.purpose_td: Provides a generic component container with no imposed behavior.
recipes.translation: An empty box that can hold anything.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: There is no neutral way to group operators hierarchically.
recipes.what_this_is_not: Not a UI or functional system by itself.

recipes.purpose_td: Outputs a momentary or stateful trigger based on user input.
recipes.translation: A thing you press to make something happen.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: User-driven triggering must be rebuilt manually.

recipes.purpose_td: Manages visual layout and interaction for child components.
recipes.translation: A box that holds UI things and shows them.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: UI elements lose spatial structure and interaction context.
recipes.what_this_is_not: Not a logic or data processor.

recipes.purpose_td: Runs a network continuously or on demand as an executable unit.
recipes.translation: A motor that keeps something running.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Encapsulated execution and triggering logic disappears.

recipes.purpose_td: Accepts and outputs editable text or numeric input.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Direct user text or number entry is unavailable.

recipes.purpose_td: Executes custom GPU code as a self-contained component.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Custom shader logic cannot be embedded at the component level.
recipes.what_this_is_not: Not a material or TOP-based shader.

recipes.purpose_td: Displays and manages a selectable list of items.
recipes.translation: A list you can click things in.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Structured selection from multiple options is lost.

recipes.purpose_td: Displays another operator’s viewer inside a component.
recipes.translation: Shows one operator inside another box.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Operators cannot be visually embedded in interfaces.

recipes.purpose_td: Exposes and edits parameters from other operators.
recipes.translation: Lets you change settings from somewhere else.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: External parameter control must be manually recreated.

recipes.purpose_td: Automatically creates copies of operators based on data.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Data-driven duplication becomes manual and brittle.

recipes.purpose_td: Chooses one component output from multiple inputs.
recipes.translation: Picks one thing and ignores the rest.

recipes.purpose_td: Outputs a continuous value controlled by the user.
recipes.translation: A bar you drag to change a number.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Smooth manual value control is unavailable.

recipes.purpose_td: Displays and edits tabular data visually.
recipes.translation: A grid of rows and columns you can see.

recipes.purpose_td: Renders formatted text as a visual element.
Outputs time-based values such as seconds and frames.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Time reference must be manually reconstructed.

recipes.purpose_td: Provides a ready-made interactive UI element.
recipes.translation: A prebuilt control you can use right away.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Common UI patterns require custom rebuilding.

recipes.purpose_td: Creates and manages an operating-system-level window.
recipes.translation: Opens a real window on your screen.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Output cannot leave the TouchDesigner interface.
recipes.what_this_is_not: Not a viewer or render target.

description: Minimal Recipes — existence proofs for Physics / Dynamics Component operators

recipes.purpose_td: Represents a physical body that participates in simulation.
recipes.translation: A thing that exists in the physics world.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: No object can be simulated as a physical entity.

recipes.purpose_td: Advances the physics simulation over time.
recipes.translation: The engine that makes physics move.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Physics states never update or resolve.

recipes.purpose_td: Restricts motion between physical actors.
recipes.translation: A rule that keeps things connected or limited.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Actors move freely without physical relationships.
recipes.what_this_is_not: Not a force or collision shape.

recipes.purpose_td: Applies directional influence to physical actors.
recipes.translation: A push or pull on things.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Actors cannot be influenced by external forces.

description: Minimal Recipes — existence proofs for Texture operators

recipes.purpose_td: Adds pixel values from multiple inputs together.
recipes.translation: Puts images on top of each other and adds the colors.
recipes.what_this_is_not: Not a blend, mask, or crossfade.

recipes.purpose_td: Measures image statistics such as minimum, maximum, or average.
recipes.translation: Looks at an image and reports numbers about it.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Image values cannot be quantified or inspected numerically.

recipes.purpose_td: Reduces jagged edges in rendered images.
recipes.what_this_is_not: Not a blur or resolution change.

recipes.purpose_td: Stores and replays a sequence of texture frames.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Past frames cannot be retained or reused.

recipes.purpose_td: Retrieves specific frames from a Cache TOP.
recipes.translation: Picks one saved image from memory.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Stored frames cannot be accessed individually.

recipes.purpose_td: Converts CHOP channel data into image pixels.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Numeric data cannot be visualized as textures.

recipes.purpose_td: Combines images using defined compositing operations.
recipes.translation: Mixes images using rules like over or multiply.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Standard image compositing operations are unavailable.

recipes.purpose_td: Generates a uniform image with fixed pixel values.
recipes.translation: Makes a flat image of one color.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: There is no base image source without input.
recipes.what_this_is_not: Not a generator of patterns or noise.

recipes.purpose_td: Executes custom C++ code to generate or modify textures.
recipes.translation: Runs your own low-level image code.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Custom CPU-based texture logic cannot be embedded.
recipes.what_this_is_not: Not a shader or GLSL process.

recipes.purpose_td: Outputs textures directly to a display device.
recipes.translation: Shows the image straight on a screen.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Textures cannot bypass windowing or compositing stages.
recipes.what_this_is_not: Not a window or render target.

description: Minimal Recipes — existence proofs for Texture operators

recipes.purpose_td: Performs pixel-wise addition across inputs.
recipes.translation: Adds the colors of images together.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: There is no way to accumulate pixel values.
recipes.what_this_is_not: Not a blend, mask, or transition.

recipes.purpose_td: Extracts numeric statistics from an image.
recipes.translation: Looks at an image and turns it into numbers.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Image values cannot be measured or queried.

recipes.purpose_td: Reduces aliasing artifacts in rendered images.
Stores a rolling history of texture frames.
Retrieves specific frames from a Cache TOP.
recipes.translation: Pulls one image from stored memory.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Stored frames cannot be accessed individually.

recipes.purpose_td: Maps CHOP channel values into image pixels.
Combines images using defined compositing operations.
Generates a uniform texture without input.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: There is no zero-dependency texture source.
recipes.what_this_is_not: Not a pattern or noise generator.

recipes.purpose_td: Executes custom CPU-based code to produce textures.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Custom low-level texture logic cannot exist in-network.

recipes.purpose_td: Sends a texture directly to a display output.
recipes.translation: Shows the image straight on a screen.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Textures cannot bypass the application window.

description: Minimal Recipes — existence proofs for Input / Output / Interop Texture operators

recipes.purpose_td: Receives textures from DirectX 10 shared surfaces.
recipes.translation: Takes an image from a DirectX program.
recipes.what_this_is_not: Not a file loader or capture device.

recipes.purpose_td: Selects specific image planes from imported textures.
recipes.translation: Picks part of an image to use.

recipes.purpose_td: Loads image sequences or movie files as textures.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: File-based video cannot enter the network.

recipes.purpose_td: Receives live video streams over NDI.
Receives camera tracking and video from NCam systems.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: NCam tracking data cannot be integrated.

recipes.purpose_td: Selects textures from an output component.
recipes.translation: Grabs an image from somewhere else.

recipes.purpose_td: Receives textures from Orbex remote rendering systems.
recipes.translation: Takes images from an Orbex server.

recipes.purpose_td: Loads point-based image data from files.
recipes.translation: Reads point pictures from a file.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Point-based texture files cannot be loaded.

recipes.purpose_td: Receives textures from a Render Stream source.
recipes.translation: Takes rendered images from another system.

recipes.purpose_td: Sends rendered textures to a Render Stream client.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Render Stream output cannot be published.

recipes.purpose_td: Captures pixels from the operating system display.
recipes.translation: Takes a picture of the screen.

recipes.purpose_td: Receives textures via shared memory.
Sends textures via shared memory.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Textures cannot be shared externally in memory.

recipes.purpose_td: Receives textures via Syphon or Spout.
Publishes textures via Syphon or Spout.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Textures cannot be shared via Syphon or Spout.

recipes.purpose_td: Receives textures from another TouchDesigner process.
recipes.translation: Gets images from another TouchDesigner file.

recipes.purpose_td: Sends textures to another TouchDesigner process.
recipes.translation: Sends images to another TouchDesigner file.

recipes.purpose_td: Captures live video from connected devices.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Camera and capture card input is impossible.

recipes.purpose_td: Outputs textures to external video hardware.
Renders web content into a texture.
recipes.translation: Turns a webpage into an image.

description: Minimal Recipes — existence proofs for Color / Channel / Image Math operators

recipes.purpose_td: Remaps and mixes color channels into new channel outputs.
recipes.translation: Takes colors apart and puts them back together differently.

recipes.purpose_td: Removes pixels based on a target color.
recipes.translation: Cuts out one color from an image.

recipes.purpose_td: Generates a uniform color image.
recipes.translation: Makes a picture of one color.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: There is no fixed-color source image.
recipes.what_this_is_not: Not a gradient or pattern generator.

recipes.purpose_td: Detects edges based on pixel contrast.
recipes.translation: Finds the outlines in an image.

recipes.purpose_td: Highlights image relief by emphasizing directional contrast.
Offsets hue, saturation, and value components.
Converts HSV color data into RGB.
recipes.translation: Turns hue-based color into normal color.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: HSV data cannot be displayed as RGB.

recipes.purpose_td: Blurs an image based on luminance values.
recipes.translation: Blurs bright and dark parts differently.

recipes.purpose_td: Adjusts image brightness using luminance.
recipes.translation: Changes how bright the image feels.

recipes.purpose_td: Performs per-pixel mathematical operations.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: General-purpose image math cannot be applied.

recipes.purpose_td: Applies one image as a transparency mask to another.
recipes.translation: Uses one picture to cut holes in another.

recipes.purpose_td: Converts an image to grayscale.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Color cannot be collapsed into luminance.

recipes.purpose_td: Keys pixels based on RGB ranges.
Converts RGB color data into HSV.
recipes.translation: Turns normal color into hue-based color.

recipes.purpose_td: Rearranges or duplicates color channels.
Applies a gradient-based image operation.
Separates pixels into on/off states based on a value.
recipes.translation: Turns pixels into black or white.

recipes.purpose_td: Compresses high dynamic range images into displayable range.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: HDR images cannot be properly displayed.

description: Minimal Recipes — existence proofs for Spatial / Mapping / Image Placement operators

recipes.purpose_td: Maps an image to four arbitrary corner points.
recipes.translation: Stretches an image to fit four corners.
recipes.what_this_is_not: Not a perspective camera or transform.

recipes.purpose_td: Restricts an image to a defined region.
recipes.translation: Cuts part of the image out.

recipes.purpose_td: Offsets pixels based on another image.
recipes.translation: Pushes pixels around using a picture.

recipes.purpose_td: Scales an image to fit a target resolution.
recipes.translation: Resizes an image to fit a box.

recipes.purpose_td: Reverses image orientation horizontally or vertically.
Keeps only overlapping regions of two images.
recipes.translation: Shows only where two images overlap.

recipes.purpose_td: Applies camera lens distortion or correction.
recipes.translation: Bends the image like a camera lens.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Lens-based warping cannot be simulated or corrected.

recipes.purpose_td: Remaps pixel values using a lookup table.
recipes.translation: Recolors pixels using a guide image.

recipes.purpose_td: Reflects an image across an axis.
recipes.translation: Copies the image like a mirror.

recipes.purpose_td: Generates or modifies surface normal maps.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Normal-based lighting information cannot be created.

recipes.purpose_td: Keeps only non-overlapping regions of two images.
Places one image on top of another using alpha.
Projects an image using camera and geometry context.
Reassigns input pixel ranges to output ranges.
recipes.translation: Changes how dark and bright values map.

recipes.purpose_td: Forces an image to a specific resolution.
Combines images using screen blending math.
Repeats an image across space.
recipes.translation: Copies the image in a grid.

recipes.purpose_td: Applies translation, rotation, and scaling to an image.
recipes.translation: Moves, turns, or resizes the image.

recipes.purpose_td: Places one image beneath another using alpha.

description: Minimal Recipes — existence proofs for Blur / Convolution / Comparison operators. Edge and Luma Blur are defined elsewhere and counted once.

recipes.purpose_td: Adds glow to bright regions by spreading high-intensity pixels.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Brightness-based glow cannot be produced as a single operation.
recipes.what_this_is_not: Not a blur or exposure change.

recipes.purpose_td: Applies uniform spatial averaging to pixels.
Applies a custom convolution kernel to an image.
recipes.translation: Uses a math grid to change the image.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Kernel-based image operations cannot be expressed.
recipes.what_this_is_not: Not a preset blur or sharpen.

recipes.purpose_td: Calculates per-pixel difference between images.

description: Minimal Recipes — existence proofs for Blur / Convolution / Difference operators. Edge and Luma Blur are acknowledged here but defined once elsewhere.

recipes.purpose_td: Spreads high-intensity pixels to simulate light bleed.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Intensity-driven glow must be rebuilt from multiple operators.
recipes.what_this_is_not: Not a general blur or color correction.

recipes.purpose_td: Applies uniform spatial averaging across pixels.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: General image softening cannot occur in a single step.

recipes.purpose_td: Processes an image using a user-defined convolution kernel.
recipes.translation: Changes the image using a small math pattern.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Custom kernel-based image operations are impossible.

recipes.purpose_td: Computes absolute pixel-wise difference between inputs.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Direct image comparison cannot be performed.

acknowledged_elsewhere.note: Defined once under gradient / feature extraction operators.

description: Minimal Recipes — existence proofs for Pattern / Generator Texture operators

recipes.purpose_td: Generates a circular shape procedurally.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Procedural circular masks must be manually constructed.
recipes.what_this_is_not: Not a vector shape or SOP.

recipes.purpose_td: Generates a cross-shaped pattern.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Cross reference patterns require custom construction.

recipes.purpose_td: Generates pixel values from a mathematical function.
Executes custom GLSL code to generate or process textures.
recipes.translation: Runs your own graphics math on the GPU.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Custom GPU texture logic cannot exist in-network.
recipes.what_this_is_not: Not a material or fixed operator.

recipes.purpose_td: Executes multiple GLSL shader passes in a single operator.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Multi-pass shader logic must be split across operators.

recipes.purpose_td: Generates procedural noise patterns.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Procedural randomness must be approximated manually.

recipes.purpose_td: Generates smooth gradients across space.
recipes.translation: Makes a fade from one color to another.
recipes.what_this_is_not: Not noise or a solid color.

recipes.purpose_td: Generates an axis-aligned rectangular shape.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Procedural rectangular masks must be rebuilt.

description: Minimal Recipes — existence proofs for Tracking / Feedback / Depth / Motion operators

recipes.purpose_td: Identifies and tracks contiguous regions in an image.
recipes.what_this_is_not: Not optical flow or object recognition.

recipes.purpose_td: Feeds the previous frame back into the current frame.
Receives depth and image data from a Kinect sensor.
recipes.translation: Gets depth video from a Kinect.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Kinect sensor data cannot enter the network.

recipes.purpose_td: Receives hand and finger tracking data from Leap Motion.
Detects motion between frames.
Calculates per-pixel motion vectors between frames.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Directional motion data cannot be extracted.

recipes.purpose_td: Receives depth and image data from Intel RealSense devices.
recipes.translation: Gets depth video from a RealSense camera.

recipes.purpose_td: Receives stereo depth and image data from a ZED camera.
recipes.translation: Gets depth video from a ZED camera.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: ZED camera data cannot be accessed.

recipes.purpose_td: Selects specific outputs from a ZED TOP.
recipes.translation: Picks which ZED image to use.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: ZED output streams cannot be isolated.

description: Minimal Recipes — existence proofs for UI / Selection / Layout Texture operators

recipes.purpose_td: Arranges multiple input textures into a defined spatial layout.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Systematic spatial arrangement of textures is impossible.

recipes.purpose_td: Combines multiple texture layers with per-layer control.
recipes.translation: Stacks pictures and mixes them one by one.

recipes.purpose_td: Displays structured list data as a texture.
recipes.translation: Turns a list into a picture.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: List-style data cannot be visualized directly.

recipes.purpose_td: Renders another operator’s viewer as a texture.
recipes.translation: Shows one operator inside an image.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Operator viewers cannot be embedded as textures.

recipes.purpose_td: Displays parameter values as a texture.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Parameter states cannot be visualized as textures.

recipes.purpose_td: Chooses one texture from multiple inputs.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Texture routing must be rebuilt manually.

recipes.purpose_td: Displays a slider control as a texture.
recipes.translation: Shows a bar you can drag.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Slider UI cannot exist in texture form.

recipes.purpose_td: Renders tabular data into a texture.
recipes.translation: Turns rows and columns into a picture.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Tables cannot be visually displayed as textures.

recipes.purpose_td: Renders text into a texture.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Text cannot exist as texture data.

recipes.purpose_td: Generates prebuilt UI elements as textures.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Texture-based UI widgets must be custom-built.

description: Minimal Recipes — existence proofs for Display / Pipeline / Color / Routing Texture operators

recipes.purpose_td: Applies MPCDI calibration data to textures.
recipes.translation: Fixes images so projectors line up.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Standardized multi-projector calibration cannot be applied.
recipes.what_this_is_not: Not a manual warp or corner pin.

recipes.purpose_td: Applies OpenColorIO color management transforms.
recipes.translation: Changes colors using a color rules file.

recipes.purpose_td: Interfaces textures with OpenVR devices.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Direct VR display output is impossible.

recipes.purpose_td: Combines multiple inputs into texture layers or arrays.
recipes.translation: Puts many images into one container.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Layered or array-based textures cannot be created.

recipes.purpose_td: Precomputes filtered environment maps for rendering.
recipes.translation: Prepares lighting pictures for shiny surfaces.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Physically based reflection filtering cannot be generated.
recipes.what_this_is_not: Not a blur or color adjustment.

recipes.purpose_td: Applies Scalable Display calibration and warping.
recipes.translation: Aligns images for big projector setups.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Scalable Display–based correction cannot be used.

recipes.purpose_td: Evaluates Substance materials into textures.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Substance materials cannot be generated in-network.

recipes.purpose_td: Receives SMPTE ST 2110 video streams.
recipes.translation: Takes broadcast video from a network.

recipes.purpose_td: Sends textures as SMPTE ST 2110 streams.
Selects one input texture based on an index.
recipes.translation: Chooses one picture at a time.

recipes.purpose_td: Creates or manipulates 3D texture volumes.
recipes.translation: Makes a stack of images as one block.

recipes.purpose_td: Accesses past frames at arbitrary times.
recipes.translation: Looks back in time at old images.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Random access to previous frames is unavailable.

recipes.purpose_td: Applies VIOSO projector calibration data.
Displays a texture in an operating-system window.
recipes.translation: Shows an image in its own window.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Textures cannot be presented outside the network viewer.
recipes.what_this_is_not: Not a render or device output.

description: Minimal Recipes — existence proofs for Timing / Angle / Attribute / Audio operators

recipes.purpose_td: Synchronizes tempo and phase with other Ableton Link–enabled applications.
recipes.translation: Keeps time with other music apps.

recipes.purpose_td: Computes angles between vectors or orientations.
Extracts attribute values from geometry or instances.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Geometry attributes cannot be used as channels.

recipes.purpose_td: Applies multi-band equalization to audio signals.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Frequency-band shaping must be rebuilt manually.

recipes.purpose_td: Spatializes audio using binaural processing.
recipes.translation: Makes sound feel like it’s around your head.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Head-related spatial audio cannot be produced.

recipes.purpose_td: Captures live audio from input hardware.
recipes.translation: Gets sound from a mic or interface.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: Live audio cannot enter the network.

recipes.purpose_td: Sends audio signals to output hardware.
Applies compression, gating, or expansion to audio.
Loads audio files as channel data.
recipes.what_breaks_if_removed: File-based audio cannot enter the network.

recipes.purpose_td: Applies frequency filtering to audio.
recipes.translation: Cuts highs or lows from sound.

recipes.purpose_td: Extracts audio from a movie file.
Receives audio streams via NDI.
Generates periodic audio waveforms.
Applies power-based equalization to audio.
Plays audio from CHOP channels.
Mixes and routes audio for output or recording.
Analyzes audio frequency content over time.
recipes.translation: Shows what frequencies are in the sound.

recipes.purpose_td: Receives streamed audio data.
Sends audio as a stream.
